page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.18xlarge is a storage-optimized server powered by the Intel Xeon 8559C processor. It features 72 vCPUs and 36 physical cores running at 3.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. The system is equipped with 576.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes a massive local storage capacity of 45,000 GB delivered via NVMe SSDs, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 38 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple domains. The server achieves top-tier status in Geekbench single-core and multi-core metrics, as well as the Passmark CPU score. Database operations are highly efficient, with Passmark database operations scoring in the top 10% and Redis SET operations reaching 91.92 million operations per second. Memory bandwidth is also robust, measuring 287.15 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads.

The Intel Xeon processor supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for deep learning acceleration. This enables strong performance in LLM inference, processing prompts at 31.61 tokens/second for a 70B model. Given its massive local NVMe storage and high memory density, this server is optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, real-time analytics, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.18xlarge is a storage-optimized server designed for data-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8559C processor, it delivers 72 vCPUs, 576.0 GB of DDR5 memory, and a massive 45,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the server achieves top-tier benchmark results, including a Passmark CPU score of 82956.08 and exceptional database operation performance. The processor supports advanced vector and matrix extensions (AVX-512 and AMX), facilitating efficient cryptographic and mathematical computations. With a baseline network bandwidth of 38 Gbps and high memory bandwidth, the i7ie.18xlarge is highly suited for large-scale databases, real-time analytics, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.18xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 72 vCPUs, 576 GB DDR5 RAM, and 45 TB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and computational performance.

tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized platform featuring 45 TB of local NVMe SSDs and advanced Intel Xeon processing.
bullet_points: 72 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8559C processors at 3.6 GHz
45,000 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
576.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz
Top-tier database and multi-core CPU benchmark performance
Advanced instruction support including AVX-512 and AMX
Optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and analytics
